findings.issue: Landing page copy reduces Atlas to 'verified talent platform' framing, omitting MindShift, BrandedBy, ZEUS, and Life Simulator
findings.recommended_fix: Update copy to state 'Atlas is a multi-faced system with five core capabilities: VOLAURA, MindShift, BrandedBy, ZEUS, and Life Simulator'

findings.issue: Documentation refers to 'Atlas as a platform' without specifying its five faces
findings.recommended_fix: Revise to 'Atlas is an organism with five faces: VOLAURA, MindShift, BrandedBy, ZEUS, and Life Simulator'

findings.issue: Marketing draft focuses solely on 'VOLAURA as a talent verification tool'
findings.recommended_fix: Add 'VOLAURA is one face of Atlas, which includes MindShift (focus), BrandedBy (AI twin), ZEUS (swarm), and Life Simulator (Godot)'
